mailbox_form: API only: for testing in a Path to Live environment, create a CSR and paste here
workflow_form: Name of MESH team or SPINE DevOps contact this request has been discussed with

live_gates.title: Current-baseline external readiness gate cleared
live_gates.reason: Phase 0 entry remains withheld and GATE_EXTERNAL_TO_FOUNDATION is still blocked.

live_gates.title: Workflow set is source traceable to bounded-context needs
live_gates.reason: Every candidate workflow row is bound to route families, bounded contexts, and business-flow summaries.

live_gates.title: Mailbox owner ODS posture is known
live_gates.reason: Placeholder ODS rows exist in the pack, but partner-specific owner ODS still needs confirmation before real submission.

live_gates.title: Third-party mailbox manager posture is decided
live_gates.reason: The form shape and register exist, but the real owner-managed versus third-party-managed posture is still placeholder-only.

live_gates.title: Path to Live versus local sandbox posture is explicit
live_gates.reason: The pack separates local sandbox, Path to Live-like rehearsal, and live mailbox need by workflow row and gate policy.

live_gates.title: Live API onboarding is complete for any live API mailbox request
live_gates.reason: Official guidance requires API onboarding before a live MESH API mailbox, and that onboarding is not yet complete.

live_gates.title: Workflow request liaison with MESH or Spine DevOps is recorded
live_gates.reason: The workflow-request dossier is prepared, but the named MESH-team contact is still empty.

live_gates.title: Named approver and environment target are present
live_gates.reason: Real submission remains fail-closed until a named approver and target environment are explicitly provided.

live_gates.title: Real mutation and spend acknowledgements are enabled
live_gates.reason: Any real mailbox or workflow submission remains blocked until both mutation and spend guards are explicitly enabled when applicable.

live_gates.title: Minimum-necessary payload and proof review is current
live_gates.reason: The route matrix encodes the proof law, but a live payload minimisation review is not yet attached.

live_gates.title: Current submission posture
live_gates.reason: The pack is ready for mock-now execution and dry-run preparation only; live mailbox and workflow submission stays blocked.
